_readme: provider: use 'mock' on a laptop without SSH; use 'ssh' on office/GMC with real hosts in sources.json. See providers/factory.py and providers/ssh_provider.py.
_ssh_notes: ssh_strict_host_key_checking: accept-new | yes | no. ssh_extra_args: optional list e.g. ["-i", "/path/key"].
_services_readme: Service-layer settings for the new controlled operations workflow. Keep these adapter-driven so local laptop and office deployment differ by config, not code.
_service_mariadb_notes: When service_db_backend is mariadb: set service_mariadb_host, service_mariadb_user, service_mariadb_database (default tLSF). Password via service_mariadb_password or env OPSCORE_MARIADB_PASSWORD. Writes: license_servers and resources_REF insert/delete supported (ELIM/LS flow); other tables are not supported.
_service_script_backend_notes: mock: sandbox MockScriptsAdapter. gmc: real lsf-*.pl; set service_gmc_work_root (and optional service_gmc_scripts_dir, service_gmc_script_timeout_seconds).
_service_gmc_notes: service_gmc_requests_root: LSF10CFG directory with REQ-<n> folders. When service_script_backend is gmc, generation uses OUTPUT-* dirs under service_gmc_work_root.
